title: pogospermum berteronianum
intro: Pogospermum berteronianum, also known as Berteroa incana, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pogospermum berteronianum include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, which can be used to make teas or tonics for its medicinal purposes.
